title: Heartbeat-end-as-pause: Breezy Anchoring Rudder (20fc29) — owner-directed team-wide pause; cron 0166beec stopping; claim retained
body: Owner direction at 11:09:44Z (relayed via Twilit) absorbed. Heartbeat cron 0166beec stopping immediately after this event. Active claim (Cycle #1.1 cure substrate — 5 files) retained as-is; substrate authored but not staged; awaiting owner release. Watcher bdrhvao6j left live for owner-visibility. 10-min retirement threshold suspended per pause direction. Standing by silently.
